name: ExpansionPanel
description: Expansion panels (accordions) let operators reveal detail on demand — collapsing a long record or settings page into named sections that open one at a time, so the screen stays manageable.
keyRule: Use expansion panels to tame dense detail (vehicle specs, settings groups). For switching between peer views of one record, prefer tabs.

variants.name: Single-open
variants.whenToUse: Only one section open at a time (guided reading).

variants.name: Multi-open
variants.whenToUse: Several sections open at once (reference scanning).

variants.name: With summary
variants.whenToUse: Show a key value on the collapsed header.

anatomy.name: Header
anatomy.description: the always-visible section title + expand/collapse affordance.

anatomy.name: Summary meta
anatomy.description: optional preview value shown on the collapsed header.

behaviors.name: Expand/collapse
behaviors.description: Clicking the header toggles the panel; the chevron rotates to reflect state.

behaviors.name: Single vs multi
behaviors.description: Decide whether opening one closes others; keep it consistent within a group.

behaviors.name: Deep linking
behaviors.description: A section can open automatically when linked to, so operators land on the right detail.

props.name: title
props.description: Section title shown in the always-visible header.

props.name: summary
props.description: Optional preview value shown on the collapsed header (the 'With summary' variant).

props.name: children
props.description: Panel body content, revealed when expanded.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state; when provided the panel no longer manages its own state, letting a parent group implement single-open vs multi-open behavior.

props.name: onToggle
props.description: Called with the next open state whenever the header is toggled.

props.name: className
props.description: Optional extra class names to compose with the base accordion class.

doThis: Name sections clearly so collapsed headers are scannable.
Show a summary value where it helps.
dontDoThis: Don't hide critical, always-needed info behind a collapse.
Don't use accordions where tabs fit better.
accessibility: The header is a button exposing aria-expanded and controlling its panel via aria-controls.
It's keyboard operable with visible focus.
The chevron is decorative — state is conveyed programmatically.

related.name: SideSheet
related.why: Details that deserve their own surface

related.name: Tabs
related.why: Peer views of the same subject
